think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify all advertisement segments in the video.

1.  **Analyze the video for advertisements.**
    *   00:56 - 01:26: Cunard cruise line advertisement.
    *   01:26 - 01:56: BDO accounting firm advertisement.
    *   06:04 - 06:49: Red Bull animated advertisement.
    *   12:14 - 12:44: Red Bull animated advertisement.
    *   22:45 - 23:15: Red Bull animated advertisement.
    *   56:33 - 57:02: BNSF Railway advertisement.
    *   57:02 - 57:12: Certified Financial Planner (CFP) advertisement.
    *   57:17 - 57:30: Carnegie Corporation of New York advertisement.

2.  **Extract timestamps and content for each segment.**

    *   **Segment 1 (Cunard):**
        *   Start: 00:56
        *   End: 01:26
        *   Transcript: "Cunard is a proud supporter of public television. On a voyage with Cunard, The world awaits. A Wound of Flavor. Diverse destinations and immersive experiences. A world of leisure. British style. with Cunard's White Star Service."
        *   Scene: Cruise ship at sea, people relaxing by a pool, dining, kayaking, dancing, reading, champagne.

    *   **Segment 2 (BDO):**
        *   Start: 01:26
        *   End: 01:56
        *   Transcript: "absolutely love my job. I'll see you next time. We look out for one another. We love to see our teammates thrive. You don't have to change how you walk, you don't have to change how you talk. We can bring our authentic selves to work and do our best stuff. That's joy."
        *   Scene: Various employees speaking in an office setting, walking down a hallway, working at desks.

    *   **Segment 3 (Red Bull 1):**
        *   Start: 06:04
        *   End: 06:49
        *   Transcript: "He is the legendary frog prince. You want me to kill you? All right. How long did you still turn into a prince? Oh my god, you're totally mean! Wait, where are you going? I want to check out the other princesses. Keep my options open. Excuse me. Oh, God. gives you wings. Don't expect Red Bull to grow wings on your back and actually make you fly."
        *   Scene: Animated cartoon of a frog prince and a princess.

    *   **Segment 4 (Red Bull 2):**
        *   Start: 12:14
        *   End: 12:44
        *   Transcript: "The world-famous University Boat Race, where the boys from Cambridge take on the defending champions... They're huge! And half of them were in the Olympics. We've lost already. Not to worry. I've given them some Red Bull. What? You've given Red Bull to our opponents? We might as well abandon ship now. Calm down. Red Bull vitalizes the mind, remember? I only gave it to the ones rowing on the right side of their boat. And see, Red Bull really does."
        *   Scene: Animated cartoon of a rowing race.

    *   **Segment 5 (Red Bull 3):**
        *   Start: 22:45
        *   End: 23:15
        *   Transcript: "Here with the last will and testament, Sir Michael Ascot bequeaths his life's possessions to his one true love."
        *   Scene: Animated cartoon of a man reading a will to a family.

    *   **Segment 6 (BNSF Railway):**
        *   Start: 56:33
        *   End: 57:02
        *   Transcript: "The engine that connects us"
        *   Scene: Historical footage of trains, modern trains, workers, landscapes.

    *   **Segment 7 (CFP):**
        *   Start: 57:02
        *   End: 57:12
        *   Transcript: "Certified financial planner professionals are proud to support PBS NewsHour. CFP professionals are committed to acting in their clients' best interests. More information at letsmakeaplan.org."
        *   Scene: Yellow background with CFP logo and text.

    *   **Segment 8 (Carnegie Corporation):**
        *   Start: 57:17
        *   End: 57:30
        *   Transcript: "Carnegie Corporation of New York, working to reduce political polarization through philanthropic support for education, democracy, and peace. More information at Carnegie.org."
        *   Scene: White background with Carnegie logo and city skyline.
